description: WOS-443 type.normal.damage.up membership fixture. WIP attacks minxxx with Reina full current kit, infantry-only, against no defending heroes. Infantry-only keeps Shadow Blade's lancer extra-skill effect ineligible, so Assassin's Instinct should affect normal damage jobs without proving extra-skill buckets. Swift Jive dodge is stochastic if unlocked; collect at least 8 observations unless fresh captured skills show dodge is locked. Pair with wos443_control_wip_attacks_minxxx_reina_infantry_nc.
